name: Chicken Marengo
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken pieces with salt and pepper.
2. Devein and clean crawdads.
3. Heat oil in a skillet and add chicken pieces, skin side down.
4. Cook over medium-high heat 3-5 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Turn and continue cooking until golden on the other side.
6. Add mushrooms and cook.
7. Add bay leaf, thyme, onion, and garlic; stir to distribute evenly.
8. When chicken is cooked about 10-12 minutes total, remove to serving dish.
9. Sprinkle remaining ingredients with flour; blend evenly.
10. Add water or wine and tomatoes; bring to a boil.
11. Return chicken to skillet; add juice around pieces.
12. Add anchovies, salt, and pepper to taste.
13. Place cleaned crawdads on top.
14. Cover and simmer 5 minutes at high heat for crawdads to cook by steam.
15. Add olives and continue cooking 5 more minutes.
16. Fry eggs and serve over individual servings as garnish.
17. Sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
